ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutual fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual fund */,
  "fund_manager" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager or management company */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was established */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy employed by the fund */,
  "benchmark_index" TEXT /* Benchmark index against which the fund's performance is compared */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk level of the fund */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Current expense ratio of the fund */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the fund's details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share class */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund this share class belongs to */,
  "share_class" TEXT /* Type of share class (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the share class */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for this share class */,
  "load_fee" REAL /* Load fee associated with the share class */,
  "redemption_fee" REAL /* Redemption fee associated with the share class */,
  "distribution_channel" TEXT /* Distribution channel for the share class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_classes_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share class for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded performance metric */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage for the share class on the specified date */,
  "net_asset_value" REAL /* Net asset value of the share class on the specified date */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return (including dividends and capital gains) on the specified date */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return of the benchmark index on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, compliance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the strategy was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_asset_values" (
  "nav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAV entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share class */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the NAV record */,
  "nav_amount" REAL /* Net asset value of the share class on the specified date */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the share class on the specified date */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the share class on the specified date */,
  "shares_outstanding" REAL /* Number of shares outstanding on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_asset_values_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_ratios" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense ratio entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share class */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year associated with the expense ratio */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the share class for the specified year */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee component of the expense ratio */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other expenses as a percentage of the fund's assets */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the share class for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_ratios_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or departments the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to perform the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "class_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first share class */,
  "class_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second share class */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "comparison_result" REAL /* Result of the comparison (e.g., difference in returns) */,
  "benchmark_comparison" REAL /* Comparison result against the benchmark index */,
  "comparison_period" TEXT /* Period over which the comparison is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_comparisons_class_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("class_id_2") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_comparisons_class_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("class_id_1") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund associated with the news */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news to the fund's performance */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_news_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition entry */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date associated with the market condition */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Description of the market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the relevant market index on that date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the market index on the specified date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest value of the market index on the specified date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest value of the market index on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund associated with the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert (e.g., NAV drops below a certain level) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the fund (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the fund's performance */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or departments the review is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
